phases.name: Pre-jump
phases.description: Athlete on the box or in freefall before landing

phases.name: Contact
phases.description: Ground contact from drop landing through propulsion to take-off

phases.name: Flight
phases.description: Airborne; force plate reads near zero

phases.name: Landing
phases.description: Impact and absorption after reactive jump

value.name: Pre-jump
value.description: Athlete on the box or in freefall before landing

pre_jump.explanation: Athlete is on the box or in freefall before landing on the plate.

value.name: Contact
value.description: Ground contact from drop landing through propulsion to take-off

contact.explanation: From drop landing to take-off; includes impact, amortization, and propulsion.

value.name: Flight
value.description: Airborne; force plate reads near zero

flight.explanation: Airborne; force plate reads near zero.

value.name: Landing
value.description: Impact and absorption after reactive jump

drop_landing.explanation: First sustained contact on the force plate after the drop.

peak_impact_force.explanation: Highest force in the impact phase (first ~120 ms of contact).

start_of_concentric.explanation: First sustained rising segment after the contact through point.

peak_drive_off_force.explanation: Highest force in the propulsive phase before take-off.

take_off.explanation: Last instant of contact before flight; force leaves baseline.

flight_land.explanation: First sustained contact after the reactive jump flight phase.

peak_landing_force.explanation: Highest force within ~150 ms of landing contact.

braking_impulse_Ns.explanation: Impulse from drop landing to CTP (N·s).

max_rfd_braking_N_s.explanation: Peak rate of force development during braking (landing to CTP) (N/s).

max_rfd_propulsive_N_s.explanation: Peak rate of force development during propulsion (CTP to take-off) (N/s).

contact_time_ms.explanation: Ground contact time from drop landing to take-off (ms).

dj_classification.explanation: DJ type classification: high_reactive (fast SSC) or low_reactive (slow SSC).
